skill1.kitLine: Activates when normal attack hits 30 time(s). Affects the target(s). Deals 82.8% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: hitCount 30 → flatDamage atkPct 82.8, target enemy
skill1.note: Kit-literal. At AR 12 pulls/s ≈ every 2.5s while firing.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when normal attack hits 30 time(s). Affects self. ATK ▲ 8.28% for 5 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[1]: hitCount 30 → buff atkPct 8.28, durationSec 5, target self
skill1.note: Kit-literal. Near-permanent uptime during sustained fire (5s duration vs ~2.5s proc interval).

skill2.kitLine: Affects enemies within range. Deals 144.73% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: shotFired + swapGate:swapped → flatDamage atkPct 144.73, target enemy
skill2.note: ⚑ INVENTED TRIGGER — kit text has NO 'Activates when…' clause (datamine dropped it). Modeled as one proc per full-charge shot of the burst weapon swap. Rationale: S2b says 'when USING THIS SKILL during Full Burst', implying a discrete activation; her only activation-shaped event is the swapped full-charge shot (AR chargeFrames 0 — cannot full-charge outside swap). Replaces prior materialized single-passive-hit encoding (fired ~1×/fight ≈ inert).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using this skill during Full Burst. Affects self. Critical Rate ▲ 26.1% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: shotFired + swapGate:swapped + fbGate:inFb → buff critRatePct 26.1, durationSec 10, target self
skill2.note: Same invented trigger as S2a. fbGate:inFb is kit-literal ('during Full Burst'). Triggering shot resolves before buff lands (apply-after-hit).

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Change the weapon in use: Charge Time: 5 sec, Damage: 499.5% of final ATK, Full Charge Damage: 1000% of damage, Max Ammunition Capacity: 1 round(s).
burst.where: burst[0]: burstCast → weaponSwap { damagePct 499.5, chargeTimeSec 5, chargeMultPct 1000, maxAmmo 1, durationSec 10 }
burst.note: chargeMultPct 1000 = '1000% of damage' → 4995% per full-charge shot (engine composes chargeMult/100 × damagePct). durationSec 10 = standard FB window (kit states no explicit duration). Engine economy: 5s charge → 1 shot at ~t+5s, maxAmmo 1 forces 111f reload, 2nd shot would land ~t+11.85s > window → exactly 1 full-charge shot per burst. Swapped shots are category 'normal' → +50% FB boost by landing timing (in-FB), not burst-cast pre-FB exemption.

Pierce is SWAP-SCOPED; schema only has always-on hasPierce which would wrongly grant AR normals pierce + feed pierceDamagePct on all fights. vs core-exposed boss the real nuke may double-hit core+body (≈ up to 2× nuke). Needs engine vocab or measurement. ⚑

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 144.73% line's trigger is INVENTED (kit text has no 'Activates when…' clause) — modeled as one proc per full-charge shot of the burst weapon swap; unmeasured ⚑
documentedConfounds.why: If the real trigger fires more often than once per swapped full-charge shot (e.g. per AR normal hit, or on a timer), the sim under-counts S2a damage. If it fires less often, over-counts. Direction depends on the real proc cadence vs the assumed 1/swap-shot.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: swap shot economy is an unmeasured estimate — engine yields exactly 1 full-charge shot (4995%) per burst window; a 2nd shot (charge-speed comps) is not expressible (engine zeroes charge speed for swap cadences) ⚑
documentedConfounds.why: If the real economy allows 2 shots (with charge-speed support or different reload timing), the sim under-counts burst damage by up to ~4995% ATK per burst — a massive COLD bias. The unit's single biggest lever per the note.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: 'Additional Effect: Pierce' unmodeled — pierce is swap-scoped and the schema only has always-on hasPierce; potential core+body double-hit on the nuke is missing ⚑
documentedConfounds.why: vs a core-exposed boss the nuke could double-hit (core + body) for up to 2× the modeled nuke damage. Always COLD when the boss has a core. Inert vs partless/coreless boss (scope lock = partless boss, so this is COLD only in non-scope-lock fights).

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ cadence tuple: pullsPerSec 12 (AR class default), reloadFrames 111, no rolling-reload assumed — all unmeasured datamine values
documentedConfounds.why: Affects S1 proc frequency and normal-attack DPS. Direction depends on real vs assumed cadence; AR 720 RPM datamine is likely close but unverified.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑ 'Full Charge Damage 1000% of damage' interpretation = ×10 on 499.5 → 4995% per full-charge shot
documentedConfounds.why: If the real interpretation is additive (+1000% base = 1499.5% total) rather than multiplicative (×10 = 4995%), the sim over-counts the nuke by ~3.3×. Recipe: read the nuke popup ÷ final ATK.

documentedConfounds.text: FB on the nuke: swapped shots are category 'normal' → +50% by landing timing (in-FB), NOT the burst-cast pre-FB exemption
documentedConfounds.why: Documented encoding choice. If swapped shots are actually category 'burst' (pre-FB exempt), the nuke loses the +50% FB boost — but the note argues the shot lands ~5s after cast, inside FB, so normal-category +50% is the correct reading.

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline (HYPOTHESIS, not validated) for Snow White (base, AR/Iron/B3). S1 is kit-literal (hitCount 30 → 82.8% rider + 8.28% ATK 5s). S2's trigger is INVENTED because the datamine dropped the 'Activates when…' clause — the author inferred it fires per swapped full-charge shot (shotFired + swapGate), making S2a a ~5×/fight damage proc instead of the prior ~1×/fight inert encoding. Burst models the charge-cannon weapon swap (499.5% base × 1000% charge = 4995% per full-charge shot, maxAmmo 1 → exactly 1 shot/burst). The three biggest open risks are: (1) the invented S2 trigger, (2) swap shot economy (1 vs 2 shots — engine cannot express charge-speed-enabled 2nd shots), and (3) swap-scoped Pierce being unmodelable (potential 2× nuke vs core-exposed bosses). No board data exists (board: null); the only fielded read (N4, 1.11) was confounded.
